[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011101101 6
1 110000001 3
2 101100111 6
3 011001011 5
4 011001001 4
5 010011010 4
6 010011000 3
7 010001100 3

01 10 110111110 7

45 54 111100111 7
56 65 111101111 8
67 76 011001011 5 match 3
70 07 111011111 8

47 74 111001001 5

61 16 011111011 7
72 27 111011101 7
